programme.desc: In the early 20th century, Kolkata was home to 20,000 Chinese. It was India's first Chinese community, made up of labourers who had migrated mainly from the Guangdong province. programme.title: Live: The Gallagher PREM
programme.desc: Harlequins v Exeter Chiefs (Kick-off 4.00pm). Coverage of the match from Twickenham Stoop. These two sides last met in the reverse fixture back in October when the Chiefs came away with a 38-0 victory. Exeter were already 24-0 up at half-time before scoring another unanswered 14 points to claim the dominant victory.

programme.title: Live: The Gallagher PREM
programme.desc: Saracens v Gloucester Rugby (Kick-off 6.30pm). Coverage of the match from StoneX Stadium. The reverse fixture at the end of December saw Saracens come away from Gloucester with a hard-fought 30-21 win. The game was on a knife-edge at half-time with the score 17-14 to Saracens before two tries in the space of six minutes took the game away from Gloucester and earnt the hosts an important victory.

programme.title: Trucking Hell - Season 2
programme.desc: A 44-ton Artic straddling the central reservation of the M1 is a rush hour headache for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve and one of the youngest Recovery Ops on the team, Pat. Crouch Recovery op Jim gets drenched as he risks life and limb trying to get a broken-down tractor back to its farm

programme.title: Trucking Hell - Season 2
programme.desc: An overturned Gas tanker full of highly flammable propane mean trouble for Crouch Recovery Incident Manager Steve. programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: After a morning on the Bayou, the Duck Camp Dinners crew enjoy a fresh cooked dinner while discussing the changing coastal wetlands of Louisiana. Jean-Paul gets to finally a hunt an area he had only heard about as a young man, and takes in the beauty of the live cypress trees this camp is known for.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: After a late night of good times, venison chili, and some old school roux the crew heads out for another day of hunting ducks. Adaptability is critical, and after a couple of quick adjustments the team finds themselves back in the ducks.

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In the South American country of Bolivia, Catfish and Rooftop put their bravery to the test. This duo goes 0 for 2 in the ring testing out their fight skills participating in traditional Tinku fighting and getting smacked down by Bolivia's Fighting Cholitas. They also face a sketchy ride up death rode just to mountain bike down an equally dangerous path. Catfish has yet to keep a meal down as our

programme.title: Strangers in Danger
programme.desc: In the most action packed trip yet, Rooftop and Catfish's trip to Thailand has them face to face with the country's nature. They wrestle a crocodile, charm a cobra, and get a massage from an elephant that's somehow more relaxing than the traditional Thai massages they tried out. The two even attempt to catch (cooked) flying chickens on their heads. Things relaxed in Thailand for a moment when the

programme.title: Billy Goes North
programme.desc: Billy and Terry make an urgent call to a wedding venue where wild turkeys are threatening to ruin the big day. Then Billy responds to an apartment where poisonous exotic pets are threatening the homeowner.

programme.title: Billy Goes North
programme.desc: Billy and Beekeeper Ian extract a bee colony from a family home, then Billy has to dodge talons and beak to remove a Great Horned Owl from a house.

programme.title: Secrets of the Great White Shark 2024
programme.desc: Feature documentary studying the history of the sharks species, alongside their anatomy and how they've helped our oceans for hundreds of millions of years. However, in the modern age they face extinction and demonisation. Over 1000 million sharks are killed every year, and it is up to us to save them.

programme.title: David Attenborough A Life on Earth
programme.desc: The incredible journey and illustrious career of one of the most travelled men in history, this documentary tells the story of how Sir David Attenborough came to be the voice of modern natural history programs by bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild Season 1
programme.desc: Once homeless and a teen-mom, Dot leaves the big city for a much needed adventure alongside Bear Grylls. She's overcome life's biggest challenges but has never tackled the wild. Her emotional journey is a truly inspiring tale of survival.

programme.title: Bear Grylls: Face the Wild Season 1
programme.desc: When a 13-year-old girl scout needs help earning a primitive camping skills badge, Bear Grylls flies to the rescue… literally. Beth's wisdom for life and the outdoors is beyond her years, but nothing can prepare her for what challenges bear has in store for this adventure.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Sejarah Tingkatan 3 Ep05
programme.desc: Rancangan ini mengisahkan bahawa Sarawak dan Sabah telah mempunyai sistem pemerintahan yang sistematik sebelum kedatangan kuasa Barat. Pemerintahan tempatan ini dilaksanakan bagi menjamin kelansungan kehidupan masyarakat berasaskan peraturan yang diterima oleh masyarakat ketika itu.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Sejarah Tingkatan 3 Ep06
programme.desc: Rancangan ini mengisahkan Negeri-Negeri Melayu Bersekutu (NNMB) diketuai oleh Residen Jeneral. Beliau bertanggungjawab kepada Majlis Mesyuarat Negeri dan Persuruhjaya Tinggi Negeri-Negeri Melayu Bersekutu yang merupakan Gabenor Negeri-negeri Selat. serta kesan-kesannya

programme.title: TVP@TTV Sejarah Tingkatan 3 Ep01
programme.desc: Rancangan ini mengisahkan bahawa Sarawak dan Sabah telah mempunyai sistem pemerintahan yang sistematik sebelum kedatangan kuasa Barat yang dilaksanakan bagi menjamin kelangsungan kehidupan masyarakat.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Sejarah Tingkatan 3 Ep02
programme.desc: Rancangan ini tentang peluasan kuasa barat di Sarawak dilakukan oleh pihak persendirian, iaitu James Brooke. Kekayaan Sarawak terutamanya sagu, antimoni dan emas menarik perhatian James Brooke untuk menguasai Sarawak. Beliau menggunakan pelbagai strategi untuk meluaskan kuasanya.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Sejarah Ting. 2 Ep02
programme.desc: 'Rancangan ini menjelaskan fungsi seni bina dalam masyarakat Alam Melayu serta menyatakan kepentingan seni bina masyarakat Alam Melayu dan kepentingan kehidupan manusia berorganisasi.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Sejarah Ting. 2 Ep03
programme.desc: Rancangan ini membincang tentang kegemilangan kerajaan yang unggul di Alam Melayu yang menghubungkait cara dan kepentingan pembentukan empayar Kesultanan Melayu Melaka.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Sejarah Ting. 1 Ep01
programme.desc: Murid-murid diberi pengertian mengenai maksud Zaman Prasejarah dan memahami empat tahap Zaman Batu dan nama-namanya dalam episod ini.

programme.title: TVP@TTV Sejarah Ting. 1 Ep02
programme.desc: Tajuk ini membincangkan perkembangan lokasi empat tamadun awal dunia iaitu Tamadun Mesopotamia, Tamadun Mesir Purba, Tamadun Indus dan Tamadun Huang He.
